Figma vs Canva: Which Is Better?

Choosing between Figma and Canva? Here's a side-by-side comparison to help you decide.

Quick verdict: Choose Figma if you need designers or small-teams. Choose Canva if you prioritize freelancers or marketers.

Figma

PricingFree / $12/mo Professional / $45/mo Organization
Rating★★★★½ 4.6/5

Key Features

  • Vector design
  • Prototyping
  • Design systems
  • Developer handoff

Pros

  • Real-time collaboration
  • Cross-platform
  • Extensive plugins

Cons

  • Expensive per editor
  • Large files slow down
  • Limited offline

Canva

PricingFree / $12.99/mo Pro / $14.99/mo Teams
Rating★★★★½ 4.5/5

Key Features

  • Templates
  • Drag-and-drop editor
  • Brand kit
  • Magic Studio AI

Pros

  • Extremely easy to use
  • Massive template library
  • Free tier generous

Cons

  • Limited original design capabilities
  • Exports can be basic
  • Branding limited on free
Try Canva →

Which Should You Choose?

Both Figma and Canva are excellent tools in their category. The right choice depends on your specific needs:

  • Choose Figma if: Collaborative interface design tool for teams
  • Choose Canva if: Online graphic design platform for non-designers
We may earn a commission if you purchase through links. All opinions are our own.
